rationale: Van Heerde et al. is not only listed in background; it is cited in the model-development and estimation sections as prior DLM work and directly invoked for a specific implementation choice. The authors state they handle cross-stage spillover similar to Van Heerde, Mela, and Manchanda (2004) by updating latent goodwill through periods with no observed sales and passing that state into the next stage. This is a meaningful methodological use rather than a passing mention.
relation_description: The citing paper applies methodological ideas from Van Heerde et al. (2004), especially the state-space treatment of latent-state evolution when observations are missing between stages. It transfers that dynamic modeling logic to the theater-to-video sequential distribution setting.
